site.lead: Data-driven World Cup 2026 forecasts from Helga: score probabilities, most likely results, and SRF/20min tip recommendations. The model combines the current fixture state, confirmed results, public source signals, and provider scoring rules. It recalculates regularly; the longer note on data versus gut feeling is in the {blog_link}.
